offer: For insurance underwriters processing 5–15 claims/month, discrepancies cause financial losses. We automate the flagging of discrepancies instead of manual review of claims.
problem: discrepancies between policy terms and submitted claims
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance underwriters
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about claims processing
DM outreach to insurance underwriters with demo video
Join community forums for insurance tools discussions
try_it: Let users try manual discrepancy flagging on 1-3 claims
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing claims data
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
